description_long: This is a medium-sized detached house with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles. The exterior walls are clad in light beige siding with white trim around the windows and doors, giving it a clean and classic appearance. The house features a prominent front porch with a small set of steps and a simple wooden railing, providing a welcoming entryway. Multiple rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on the visible facades, allowing ample natural light inside. The structure sits on a green, grassy base, suggesting a suburban or residential neighborhood setting. The overall design is practical and unadorned, with a focus on functionality and comfort.
description: A beige, gable-roofed house with white-trimmed windows and a front porch, set on a grassy base. The design is simple, functional, and typical of suburban residential homes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch with steps, a window to the right, and the prominent gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep gable roof, two upper windows, and a side window, with the porch partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the roof and a plain wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the front porch and the side of the house, with multiple windows and the gable roof clearly visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Front porch with steps, simple wooden railing, and a single main door with white trim.
